analysis_commentary: warmup=500 + scaling flags on: held stable under build 352 (95 training steps, max bounded [0.057, 0.169], no collapse, top1_legal briefly positive). But throughput regression means illegal stayed 0.998-0.9999 and aboveU=0 — insufficient SGD steps to learn legal moves in the window. Clearly worse than current-best's illegal_min=0.235, aboveU_max=7. Warmup continues to work as designed (grad norm 68, under alarm); just no room to show it.
